Name: Bite Of The Lycan
Description: Myths abound about the power of a werewolf's bite, with many tales suggesting it's responsible for turning a regular human into a slavering beast - this Gift likely inspired some of these stories. Following a bite from a Garou, the human victim gives into their basest urges and goes feral - although no physical changes occur. This Gift can be used in any form and is taught by spirits associated with venom or darkness, such as snake-spirits, bat-spirits, or even Banes.
System: After a successful bite, make a Gift test against the victim's Composure + Resolve; the effects persist for one night for every point of success in the margin. Once bitten, the human begins to feel overwhelmed by their darker urges: on the first night they're constantly angry, alienating those around them; on the second night, they turn violent at the slightest provocation, and by the third night they lose any inhibitions, fully willing to kill should the opportunity present itself.
Duration: One night per point of margin
